FR-01.title: User Registration and Authentication
requirements: Users can register with email or social media accounts
Password must be securely hashed
System sends verification email after registration
Social login via Google and Facebook

FR-02.title: User Profile Creation
requirements: Users can create profile with name, bio, and profile picture
Profile picture supports JPEG and PNG up to 5MB
Username must be unique and 3-20 characters
Bio is optional with max 160 characters

FR-03.title: Post Creation and Sharing
requirements: Users can create posts with text, images, and videos
Posts can be public or private
Users can tag other users in posts
Posts support hashtags for discoverability

FR-04.title: News Feed
requirements: Display posts from followed users in chronological order
Infinite scroll loading for feed
Pull-to-refresh for latest posts
Show post author, content, like count, and comment count

FR-05.title: Like and Comment System
requirements: Users can like and unlike posts
Users can comment on posts
Comments support text and emoji
Post owner receives notification on like and comment

FR-06.title: Follow and Unfollow
requirements: Users can follow other users
Users can unfollow users they follow
Follower and following counts displayed on profile
Private accounts require follow approval

FR-07.title: Direct Messaging
requirements: Users can send private text messages
Messages delivered in real-time
Users can block and report abusive messages
Read receipts show delivery status

FR-08.title: Story Feature
requirements: Users can post stories that disappear after 24 hours
Stories support images and short videos
Stories show viewer list to the author
Stories appear at top of the feed

FR-09.title: User Search and Discovery
requirements: Search bar to find users by name or username
Explore page showing trending posts
Suggested users based on mutual connections
Search results show user avatar, name, and follower count

FR-10.title: Push Notifications
requirements: Notifications for likes, comments, follows, and messages
Users can customize notification preferences
Notification center shows all recent activity
Badge count on app icon

FR-11.title: Content Moderation
requirements: Users can report inappropriate content
Admin dashboard for reviewing reports
Automatic content filtering for profanity
Admin can remove posts and ban users

FR-12.title: Privacy Settings
requirements: Users can set account to private
Users can control who can message them
Users can hide online status
Users can download their data

FR-01.title: Plan User Registration and Authentication Workflow and Contracts
FR-01.description: Review the SRS requirement bullets for user registration and authentication and break them into executable API, UI, data, security, and reporting subtasks. Define the workflow states, user roles, field-level validations, request/response contracts, and failure cases before implementation starts. Use these requirement drivers as the baseline: Users can register with email or social media accounts; Password must be securely hashed; System sends verification email after registration.
acceptance_criteria: The end-to-end workflow for user registration and authentication is documented from trigger to completion
Validation rules, role restrictions, and error scenarios for user registration and authentication are explicitly defined
Implementation subtasks for user registration and authentication can be picked up independently by engineering

FR-01.title: Implement User Registration and Authentication Backend Services
FR-01.description: Build the backend services for user registration and authentication on React Native, Node.js, Firebase. Create route handlers or service endpoints, model the core business operations, enforce validation and authorization rules, persist workflow state changes, and add structured error handling and audit logging. Make sure the implementation covers these behaviors: Users can register with email or social media accounts; Password must be securely hashed; System sends verification email after registration.
acceptance_criteria: Core user registration and authentication business rules are implemented for Social Media Application
Validation, authorization, and error handling are covered for user registration and authentication
API/service behavior for user registration and authentication is testable and documented for integration

FR-01.title: Implement User Registration and Authentication Frontend Flow
FR-01.description: Build the frontend flow for user registration and authentication with the exact forms, tables, filters, wizards, status indicators, and action buttons required by the SRS. Connect the UI to the backend contract, handle optimistic updates or refresh flows where needed, and provide user-facing validation, permissions feedback, loading states, and recovery states.
acceptance_criteria: The user registration and authentication user flow is accessible and responsive across supported browsers
Forms, filters, tables, and feedback states for user registration and authentication behave correctly
The user registration and authentication UI is fully integrated with backend APIs and handles loading and error states

FR-01.title: Integrate External Dependencies for User Registration and Authentication
FR-01.description: Implement the external integration points used by user registration and authentication, such as third-party APIs, SSO, messaging gateways, payment rails, import/export pipelines, or bank feeds. Add retry-safe behavior, timeout handling, observability, and fallback behavior for downstream failures.
acceptance_criteria: External dependencies used by user registration and authentication are connected through stable integration layers
Timeout, retry, and failure handling for user registration and authentication integrations are implemented and testable
Secrets, credentials, and integration logs for user registration and authentication are handled securely

FR-01.title: Harden User Registration and Authentication Security and Access Rules
FR-01.description: Apply security controls to user registration and authentication. Implement role checks, field-level protections, data masking where appropriate, secure defaults, audit trails, and abuse-prevention rules. Verify that sensitive operations are guarded both in the API layer and in the UI visibility rules.
acceptance_criteria: Access control rules for user registration and authentication are enforced consistently across API and UI layers
Sensitive operations and data paths in user registration and authentication are audited and protected against misuse
Security validation for user registration and authentication passes review and automated checks

FR-01.title: Write User Registration and Authentication Automated and End-to-End Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for user registration and authentication. Cover valid flows, invalid inputs, permission failures, state transitions, data integrity checks, and regression-prone edge cases pulled from the SRS. Add fixtures or mocks that make the feature verifiable in CI and local development.
acceptance_criteria: Happy path and failure cases for user registration and authentication are covered by automated tests
Permission checks and validation rules for user registration and authentication are verified
Regression coverage exists for the most critical user registration and authentication scenarios
